name: open-design
description: Local-first design product: detects your installed code-agent CLI, runs design skills + design systems, streams artifacts into a sandboxed preview.

scripts.preview: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon daemon
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/web test && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon test && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/e2e test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/contracts typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/e2e exec tsc -p ../scripts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/e2e typecheck && corepack pnpm run check:residual-js
scripts.start: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon start
